content: agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py

agent2: adding with_counts bool param to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (yields (grouper, items, count) tuples when True). Will edit those two functions now - ping me your current diff/status so I don't clobber case_sensitive; I'll merge carefully and check coop-recv before finalizing.
